ab: ku talragili sya Retage, mialri ka lalake ki Ngudradrekay.
ch: 我的好朋友叫Ratage，他也是魯凱族的小孩。
en: My good friend’s name is Ratage, and he is also an Rukai child.

ch: 我們一起在霧台部落讀書。
en: We study together in the Vedai tribe.

ab: Tataelreanenay kilalalra luabulru ku marudrawdrangenay, malrigilinay Ngudradreadrekadhane.
ch: 我們常常一起聽耆老說故事，我們都很會說霧台魯凱語。
en: We often listen to the elders telling stories together, and we both can speak the Rukai proficiently.

ab: Maelrengaku si kabitulru, ka Ratage kuladhane si edrekane.
ch: 我很高也很胖，Ratage很矮也很瘦。
en: I am tall and overweight, while Ratage is short and thin.

ab: Mapabibitiki kay Retage lakadalameta ki lasu.
ch: Ratage很有活力，大家都很喜歡他。
en: Ratage is very energetic, and everyone likes him a lot.
